channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Xiaomi unveils its first range-extender SUV and it looks like a private jet on wheels
item.description: Xiaomi's first gas-powered model is a huge luxury SUV with 930 miles of range

item.title: Already rich, already successful, why the last wave of tech winners is grinding again
item.description: They're rolling up their sleeves again, seemingly out of fear of missing AI's defining moment and, presumably, the irresistible allure of making even more money -- potentially a lot more.

item.title: The American Dream is killing me — until I see Billie Joe Armstrong's new Marshall guitar amp (and then I'm as consumerist as they come)
item.description: It would be hard to walk the Boulevard of Broken Dreams carrying Marshall’s new signature amp, but Billie Joe Armstrong still thinks you should try
